speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. So, I need all of you to roll-- is Trinket still in your necklace?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as Vex, you focus, concentrating on the lodestone that you saw before.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Through the portal behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No no no, it finds similar objects.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know, I know, I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's see, you feel the direction pull you this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know how far away, but the distance pulls you in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There is a lodestone within a thousand feet that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know, Taryon just gave me an idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I tend to have that effect on people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for your infinite wisdom, Taryon. We might be able to use a Daylight spell as a distraction worst case scenario, because I can place it somewhere and then leave it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that is smart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If we have to use an opal we can.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So, we can be far away when we activate it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How far away can you place that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She can cast it on an object and leave it behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can leave it. As a distraction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You could--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's not cast it near the portal, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't wanna do it right now, but I'm just throwing it out there--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: -- cast it on the tip of an arrow and I can shoot it at least 150 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's a hundred percent true, we've done that before.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Very good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just keep that in mind. All right. Yeah. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Filing it away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, we have a direction, are we ready?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's try to move stealthily, for a little while. Or should I just drop it and cast Pass Without A Trace right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's see how we feel?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's see how we feel. I'll go ahead and do Pass Without A Trace on us and we'll try and move in the direction that she called.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh good call. All right.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to go ahead and roll and add your wisdom modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Your hand is lateral.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Towards the way your hand is going.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to use my Alter Self swim speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And swim that direction as far as I can. Do I get a better location on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get there, and you're still feeling it in this direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll double my speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's really confusing. On a fundamental level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do another investigation check? Is it near me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unfortunately, no. Investigation is one of those things where you spend your action moving through and searching in the vicinity. Other than your bonus action, that's about as much as you can get. You just feel it's in this direction from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As a bonus action, who's near me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The kraken's about 20 feet above you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah yeah yeah yeah. Party members.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Party members, you have Percival, Taryon, and Vax. I'm sorry, that's Vex over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to do-- you're fine, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Eh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're great. I'm going to do a Grasping Vine and see if I can get Taryon out of the kraken's grasp with Grasping Vine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. From--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A lot of big words.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Get Taryon out of the kraken's grasp with Grasping Vine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where does the Grasping Vine start from?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I get it kind of towards that-- sorry, deal with me. This guy here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This stone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Yeah yeah yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there? Okay so a vine curls up, whips towards--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Taryon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Taryon. Wraps around--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (choking sounds)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For this, I'm going to say this is an opposed check of the vine versus the kraken's strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Strength?
